items.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
items.description: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.

items.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.description: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.description: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

items.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
items.description: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
items.description: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.description: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.description: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.description: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.description: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
